name: Code Review (Strict)
description: Like Code Review, but reviewers MUST cite [file:line] for every claim about code.

phases.name: Submit
phases.prompt: Present the code or feature you want reviewed. Explain what changed and why. Cite [file:line] for the key changes.

phases.name: Review
phases.prompt: Review the submission. Identify issues, suggest improvements. Be specific and evidence-based. Any claim about the code MUST cite [file:line] (e.g. 'auth.py:42 calls validate_token before route guard'). Uncited claims will be treated as hypotheses and ignored.

phases.name: Respond
phases.prompt: Address the feedback. What will you change? What do you disagree with and why? Cite [file:line] when discussing specific code.

phases.name: Summary
phases.prompt: Summarise: what was agreed, what changes are needed, what remains unresolved. Reference [file:line] for each action item. If the summary exceeds ~30 lines, Write it to .agentchattr/artifacts/session-{session_id}/review-summary.md and reference the path in chat.
